checkpoints.title: Health check endpoint
checkpoints.description: Service must expose a health endpoint for liveness/readiness probes.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a /health endpoint that returns HTTP 200 when the service is operational and 503 when degraded.

checkpoints.title: Authentication middleware
checkpoints.description: All API endpoints must be protected by authentication (JWT, OAuth, API key, or equivalent).
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add authentication middleware to your API. Options: JWT validation, OAuth2, API key validation, or your org's auth SDK.

checkpoints.title: Rate limiting configured
checkpoints.description: API should have rate limiting to prevent abuse and protect backend resources.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add rate limiting middleware. Consider per-client and global limits.

checkpoints.title: Request validation
checkpoints.description: API inputs must be validated before processing.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add request validation using a schema library (Pydantic, Zod, Joi, FluentValidation, etc.).

checkpoints.title: Structured error responses
checkpoints.description: API must return consistent, structured error responses (not stack traces).
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add centralized error handling that catches unhandled exceptions and returns structured JSON error responses, not raw stack traces.

checkpoints.title: Structured logging
checkpoints.description: Service must use structured logging (JSON format preferred) for queryable log analysis.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Configure a structured logging library. Recommended: Python structlog, Node pino/winston, .NET Serilog, Go zap/slog.

checkpoints.title: Request tracing / correlation IDs
checkpoints.description: Service should propagate correlation or trace IDs for distributed request tracing.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add request/correlation ID middleware and propagate trace context (OpenTelemetry recommended).

checkpoints.title: Graceful shutdown handling
checkpoints.description: Service must handle SIGTERM gracefully — drain connections, finish in-flight requests, then exit.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Handle SIGTERM: stop accepting new connections, wait for in-flight requests to complete (with a timeout), then exit cleanly.

checkpoints.title: Dockerfile present
checkpoints.description: Service must have a Dockerfile for consistent, reproducible deployments.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a Dockerfile. Use a multi-stage build for smaller images.

checkpoints.title: API documentation
checkpoints.description: API endpoints must be documented (OpenAPI/Swagger, AsyncAPI, or equivalent).
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add an OpenAPI/Swagger spec documenting your API endpoints, request/response schemas, and authentication.

checkpoints.title: Timeout configuration
checkpoints.description: HTTP client calls and database queries must have explicit timeouts to prevent resource exhaustion.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Set explicit timeouts on all HTTP client calls and database connections. Never rely on default (infinite) timeouts.

checkpoints.title: Retry policy for downstream calls
checkpoints.description: Calls to downstream services should have retry logic with backoff.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for calls to downstream services. Libraries: Polly (.NET), tenacity (Python), resilience4j (Java).

checkpoints.title: Monitoring dashboard
checkpoints.description: Service must have a production monitoring dashboard showing RED metrics (Request rate, Error rate, Duration/latency) and saturation.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create a monitoring dashboard with panels for: request rate, error rate, P50/P95/P99 latency, and resource saturation. Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json with the dashboard URL.

checkpoints.title: Alerting configured
checkpoints.description: Critical service metrics must have alert rules that page on-call when breached.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Configure alerts for: error rate spike, latency degradation, and health check failure. Link to alert configuration in .readiness/external-evidence.json

checkpoints.title: On-call rotation registered
checkpoints.description: Service must be registered in incident management with an active on-call rotation.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Register your service in PagerDuty/OpsGenie/ICM with an on-call rotation. Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json

checkpoints.title: Runbook documented
checkpoints.description: Service must have a runbook covering common failure scenarios, debugging steps, and escalation paths.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Write a runbook covering: common alerts and what to do, how to restart/rollback, dependency health checks, and escalation contacts. Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json

checkpoints.title: Observability SDK and backend
checkpoints.description: Service must have an observability SDK wired in code AND the monitoring backend must be configured to receive telemetry.
checkpoints.fix_hint: 1) Install an observability SDK (OpenTelemetry recommended) and configure trace/metric export. 2) Verify the backend is receiving data and attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json
